originalTitle: Nasdaq and S&P 500 slip while Dow hits record high
summary: STORY: Wall Street's main indexes ended mixed on Tuesday, with the Dow gaining just under two-thirds of a percent to notch its second straight record-high close... while the S&P 500 shed more than half a percent and the Nasdaq dropped more than one percent. Shares of Elon Musk's SpaceX ended nearly 5% higher, paring earlier gains. For much of the session, the rocket and AI company's value was above that of Amazon, and it briefly surpassed Microsoft's valuation, as retail investors continued to pour into the stock after its record-breaking IPO. But Amol Dhargalkar, chairman and managing partner at Chatham Financial, warned of several risks that could trigger volatility for SpaceX and other AI-related stocks. "I think that's a really difficult position to be in as a retail investor, especially when you consider the fact that there is a lot of risk, not just in the business model, but these are names where the cash flows are likely far into the future. And we are not in a period of 0% or negative interest rates or even declining interest rates at this point. There's a lot of question as to whether interest rates will continue to be flat or will they go up. And that can certainly be a meaningful drag on valuations of high growth companies, especially where that growth is out far into the future." Investors will look for clues on where interest rates are headed when the Federal Reserve concludes its latest two-day policy meeting on Wednesday, with Kevin Warsh holding his first press conference as Fed chair. Other stocks on the move included shares of Olin, which sank nearly 6% after the chemical producer said it would acquire Huntsman in an all-stock deal valued at more than $2.4 billion. Huntsman shares also fell as the offer stood at a discount to the stock's recent price. :: Yum Brands And shares of Yum Brands rose after the fast-food company said it would sell its Pizza Hut chain for $2.7 billion, against a backdrop of softer consumer spending across the fast-food industry.

For much of the session, the rocket and AI company's value was above that of Amazon, and it briefly surpassed Microsoft's valuation, as retail investors continued to pour into the stock after its record-breaking IPO. But Amol Dhargalkar, chairman and managing partner at Chatham Financial, warned of several risks that could trigger volatility for SpaceX and other AI-related stocks. "I think that's a really difficult position to be in as a retail investor, especially when you consider the fact that there is a lot of risk, not just in the business model, but these are names where the cash flows are likely far into the future. And we are not in a period of 0% or negative interest rates or even declining interest rates at this point. There's a lot of question as to whether interest rates will continue to be flat or will they go up. And that can certainly be a meaningful drag on valuations of high growth companies, especially where that growth is out far into the future." Investors will look for clues on where interest rates are headed when the Federal Reserve concludes its latest two-day policy meeting on Wednesday, with Kevin Warsh holding his first press conference as Fed chair. Other stocks on the move included shares of Olin, which sank nearly 6% after the chemical producer said it would acquire Huntsman in an all-stock deal valued at more than $2.4 billion. Huntsman shares also fell as the offer stood at a discount to the stock's recent price. :: Yum Brands And shares of Yum Brands rose after the fast-food company said it would sell its Pizza Hut chain for $2.7 billion, against a backdrop of softer consumer spending across the fast-food industry.
chineseTitle: 纳斯达克和标准普尔 500 指数下滑，道指创历史新高
chineseSummary: 故事：周二，华尔街主要股指收盘涨跌互现，道琼斯指数上涨近三分之二，连续第二次创下收盘纪录新高……而标准普尔 500 指数下跌超过 0.5%，纳斯达克指数下跌超过 1%。埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 旗下 SpaceX 的股价收盘上涨近 5%，回吐早前涨幅。在交易日的大部分时间里，这家火箭和人工智能公司的估值都高于亚马逊，并短暂超过了微软的估值，因为散户投资者在其破纪录的首次公开募股后继续涌入该股。但查塔姆金融公司 (Chatham Financial) 董事长兼执行合伙人阿莫尔·达尔加尔卡 (Amol Dhargalkar) 警告称，存在可能引发 SpaceX 和其他人工智能相关股票波动的多种风险。 “我认为作为散户投资者，这是一个非常困难的处境，特别是当你考虑到这样一个事实，即存在很大的风险，不仅在商业模式中，而且这些公司的现金流可能在遥远的未来。而且我们目前还没有处于0％或负利率甚至利率下降的时期。关于利率是否会继续持平还是会上升，存在很多问题。这肯定会对高增长公司的估值产生重大拖累，尤其是在这种增长还遥遥无期的情况下。”当美联储周三结束最新的为期两天的政策会议时，投资者将寻找利率走向的线索，凯文·沃什将召开他作为美联储主席的首次新闻发布会。其他上涨的股票包括奥林 (Olin) 的股票，该化学生产商表示将以价值超过 24 亿美元的全股票交易收购亨斯迈 (Huntsman)，该公司股价下跌近 6%。由于收购要约较该股近期价格折让，亨斯迈股价也下跌。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
